{ "name": "symfony/css-selector", "type": "library", "description": "Converts CSS selectors to XPath expressions", "keywords": [], "homepage": "https://symfony.com", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Fabien Potencier", "email": "fabien@symfony.com" }, { "name": "Jean-François Simon", "email": "jeanfrancois.simon@sensiolabs.com" }, { "name": "Symfony Community", "homepage": "https://symfony.com/contributors" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.2" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Symfony\\Component\\CssSelector\\": "" }, "exclude-from-classmap": [ "/Tests/" ] }, "minimum-stability": "dev" }
